Notes & Professional Observations

Data Definitions â Billing Â· Contract Â· Revenue (GL)

  • Revenue â GL (General Ledger): account balances by project Ă year 2018â2025 â includes non-billing items such as HO, internal units (DS, ME, HR, ST), adjustments Z_xxxxx and negatives (reversals) Â· total 4,258,603,041.01 THB
  • Billing â Invoice (Issue Invoice actual / AR): the Â«amount before VATÂ» from the invoice-issuance report by project Ă year 2015â2026 (incl. 1 undated invoice of GLI22010) Â· total 3,769,538,864.93 THB
  • Contract Value (Contract Amount): contract/PO value by project from the Contract Amt. column in report AR 4.3.1 (82 projects) Â· total 5,023,917,577.36 THB â compared with Billing it shows billing progress (Billing Ă· Contract)
  • Variance = Revenue (GL) â Billing = +489,064,176.08 THB Â· by-project status: matched to the baht 28 Â· variance 43 Â· GL only 26 Â· Invoice only 11

Considerations

  • Different lenses: the variance reflects the gap between Â«accounting revenue recognition (GL)Â» and Â«invoice issuance (AR)Â», plus scope/timing differences â review the definitions before drawing conclusions
  • Some codes donât map 1:1: the GL holds GLI25003 / 25008 / 25009 combined, while Invoice splits them #1 / #2 â this group is not a 1:1 match
  • File Book5: attachment not yet received â once sent (Excel/CSV preferred) it will be reconciled against the GL for an extra layer of verification
  • Current GL source: built from the numeric table provided by the user, reconciling to 4,258,603,041.01 â matching the userâs computed total to the baht
